headline: Did Cboe’s New Bitcoin Volatility Index and Prediction Contracts Just Shift Cboe Global Markets' (CBOE) Investment Narrative?
summary: Cboe Global Markets recently outlined plans for two new offerings: the Cboe IBIT Volatility Index (BITVX), applying its VIX methodology to bitcoin via options on the iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF, and an innovative Mini S&P 500 prediction market contract with three-tiered payouts, both aimed at reshaping access to volatility and outcome-based trading. Together with fresh ETF listings on its exchange and calls for tighter oversight of competing prediction platforms, these launches highlight...
